expected_outputs.stabilization_patch:
diff --git a/scheduler.py b/scheduler.py
@@ sort tasks by (priority, id) for a stable order @@
expected_outputs.analysis: Failed 7/100 runs. Root cause: tasks with equal priority had nondeterministic order from a set. Mitigation rejected: adding a sleep. Fix: deterministic sort key.

notes: Captures repeated-run evidence and fixes the root cause rather than masking it with sleeps.
